summary: DRGFP doctrine canonique (Dependency Resolution & Gap-Filling Protocol) + migration 8 skills critiques au pattern. (1) Doctrine `dependency-resolution-protocol.md` créée · 3 niveaux canoniques L1 auto-fill silent + L2 ask-operator gate + L3 degraded with flag · routage binaire default L1>L3>L2 · frontmatter SKILL.md déclaratif `prerequisites[]` validé schema v2.37 · Step 0bis prerequisite_check pattern · operator surface translation jargon (L1/L2/L3 → automatique/à toi/partiel) · couplé confidence-propagation v2.37 + canon-tool schema v1.1 v2.37 + brand-isolation v2.37. (2) Lexicon entry DRGFP ajoutée + skill-authoring-discipline section 4 invariants enrichie (ligne 2ter prerequisites recommended v2.38, required v2.39+ producer/orchestrator). (3) Migration 8 skills au pattern · define-specs v1.0 → v1.1 (4 prereqs L1×3 L2×1) · profile-audience v1.0.1 → v1.1 (4 prereqs L1×3 L3×1, HR2.5 v2.35 formalisé) · weight-dimensions v1.0 → v1.1 (2 prereqs L1×1 L3×1) · score-matrix v1.0 → v1.1 (4 prereqs L1×3 L3×1) · produce-paid-angles v1.4 → v1.5 (7 prereqs L1×5 L2×1 L3×1, HR4.5 v2.36 formalisé) · produce-copy-brief v1.2 → v1.3 (4 prereqs L1×3 L3×1) · compose-creative v1.0.2 → v1.1 (5 prereqs L1×4 L3×1, HR1.4 v2.35 formalisé) · recompose-creative v1.0 → v1.1 (3 prereqs L1×2 L2×1). Step 0bis prerequisite_check ajouté chaque skill avant Step 1 existant. HR existing préservées prose (cohérence runtime). Manifest regen 49 skills. Backward compat strict additif partout · skills v2.37 sans prerequisites field continuent à valider, default brand_only + min + L1 silent inferred.
